introSection: Holzwurm-Achterbahn (English: Wood Worm-Roller Coaster) is a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Jaderpark in Jaderberg, Lower Saxony, Germany.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: Holzwurmachterbahn is a Tivoli Medium coaster installation from Zierer.

fullText:
Holzwurm-Achterbahn (English: Wood Worm-Roller Coaster) is a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Jaderpark in Jaderberg, Lower Saxony, Germany.

Holzwurmachterbahn is a Tivoli Medium coaster installation from Zierer.

Bordeaux track and beige supports.
